subject: [GENERAL] Bump version for Honolulu
commit_message:
[GENERAL] Bump version for Honolulu

Move to version 8.0.0 for Honolulu release.
Update the doc.

Issue-ID: OOM-1
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>
Change-Id: I127ab21a1e86fb1dc5e4628cac0d78fe1cd917a2

Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

shouldn't the copyright notices be getting updated, as in

Copyright 2017-2021

All of our other projects keep their copyright notices updated whenever a change goes into the next year, or add a new copyright notice for the current year when someone from a new company makes the change

Patch Set 2:

> Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1
> 
> shouldn't the copyright notices be getting updated, as in

> Copyright 2017-2021
> 
> All of our other projects keep their copyright notices updated whenever a change goes into the next year, or add a new copyright notice for the current year when someone from a new company makes the change
